name: cynco-accounting-skills
description: Malaysian accounting engagement plugins — source documents through bookkeeping, reconciliations, year-end adjustments, MPERS technical review, financial statements, quality review, tax, and finalisation. Built for compilation and year-end work under MPERS/MFRS and ITA 1967.

plugins.name: engagement-accounting
plugins.description: Firm setup, engagement intake, source-document collection, client workspaces, and the full end-to-end engagement pipeline orchestrator.

plugins.name: bookkeeping-accounting
plugins.description: Record sales, purchases, receipts, payments and journals; classify every transaction against the chart of accounts; produce balancing journal entries.

plugins.name: reconciliation-accounting
plugins.description: Bank reconciliations and subledger ties (AR, AP, inventory, fixed assets, loans, taxes) culminating in a preliminary trial balance.

plugins.name: year-end-accounting
plugins.description: Year-end adjustments — depreciation, accruals, prepayments, inventory, ECL, tax provision, FX — and the adjusted trial balance.

plugins.name: mpers-accounting
plugins.description: MPERS (and MFRS) technical review of significant balances and a disclosure completeness checklist before financial statements are finalised.

plugins.name: financial-statements-accounting
plugins.description: Prepare primary statements, notes to the financial statements, compilation reports, and Excel working-paper workbooks.

plugins.name: quality-review-accounting
plugins.description: Mathematical integrity, cross-ties, comparative opening balances, note-to-primary consistency, and MPERS disclosure QC.

plugins.name: finalisation-accounting
plugins.description: Lock accounts, management approval packs, auditor deliverables, and statutory/tax filing handoff from finalised figures.

plugins.name: tax-accounting
plugins.description: Malaysian tax computations (Form B/C/P/PT/TF/TP), capital allowances, and statutory deduction checks (EPF/SOCSO/EIS/PCB).
